title: The Inexplicable Giant Floating Baby Head

content.problemStatement:
A Dr.D’s Legacy Original\textit{A Dr.D's Legacy Original}A Dr.D’s Legacy Original

Dr.D wishes to choose exactly KKK distinct integers from a given interval [L,R][L, R][L,R] in such a way that the bitwise AND of the chosen integers is maximum possible. Find this maximum value.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers LLL, RRR and KKK.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the maximum value of the bitwise AND.
